Landing.heroTitlePrefix: GoldBot — built for traders who want
Landing.heroSubtitle: GoldBot is an MT5 EA with account-bound cloud compilation, and risk-aware execution logic designed for controlled MetaTrader 5 deployment.
Landing.decisionRulesDetails: Consistent decision rules, protective recovery logic, and account-level security are designed into the experience from the start.

Checkout.checkoutSubtitle: Complete your purchase to access GoldBot instantly.
Checkout.successMessage1: Success! Your GoldBot access is now active. We've sent an email to
Checkout.successMessage2: with your login credentials and getting-started guide.
Checkout.nextStepDetails: Check your inbox (and spam folder). Log in with your temporary password to access your dashboard and download your EA.
Checkout.setMt5Later: You will set your MetaTrader 5 account in your dashboard after payment.
Checkout.freeTrialAction: Click below to instantly activate your 3-day trial. No credit card required.
Checkout.paygateRedirect: Clicking confirm will redirect you to Paygate.to to securely process your crypto or fiat payment.
Checkout.autoRenews: Auto-renews unless cancelled. Lifetime passes are a one-time payment.

Tutorials.platformTutorialsSubtitle: Master GoldBot and maximize your edge in the markets with precise configurations.
Tutorials.tut1Desc: Step-by-step guide on moving the compiled .ex5 from your Dashboard into your terminal's Expert folder.
Tutorials.step1Desc: Navigate to your GoldBot Dashboard and locate your active license. Click the Compile & Download button to trigger the windows service to compile a fresh .ex5 locked to your account number.
Tutorials.step2Desc: Launch MetaTrader 5. Click File in the top navigation, and select Open Data Folder. Navigate to MQL5 / Experts and paste the downloaded GoldBot_v2.ex5 into this folder.
Tutorials.step3Desc1: For optimal performance, it is highly recommended to leave the EA running 24/5 on a Virtual Private Server (VPS). This guarantees uninterrupted connectivity and execution.
Tutorials.step3Desc2: If you decide to run the EA manually on your local computer, you must turn it on every day at 7:00 AM CET and leave it running completely uninterrupted until it successfully executes a trade.
Tutorials.tut2Desc: Deep dive into recovery dynamics, lot sizing multipliers, and how to safely configure the EA based on your exact starting balance.
Tutorials.drawdownDesc: GoldBot utilizes a selective recovery mechanism. Once the primary position goes into drawdown by X pips (defined as your Grid parameter), the EA deploys pending stop orders in the same zone rather than immediately executing at market.
Tutorials.adjustLotDesc: For prop firms, we recommend a strict 1.3x to 1.5x lot multiplier. Never exceed 1.5x unless you are trading on a personal account with higher risk tolerance. Below are specific recommended parameter configurations based on your starting capital.
Tutorials.tut3Desc: Learn how the holiday filters protect your equity by automatically dodging low liquidity days across major banks.
Tutorials.liquidityGuardDesc: Major bank holidays affect trading volume globally. GoldBot automatically cross-references its internal calendar with UK, US, DE, FR, and IT holidays. If a Tier-1 country is offline, the EA drastically reduces its entry frequency or pauses entirely.
Tutorials.manualFxDesc: Important: Always check the FX news and economic calendars on your own. When the market is observing a holiday, the bot should strictly be kept OFF. If powerful countries have a public holiday, you must keep the bot turned OFF manually, because the volatility and dramatically lower market volume can cause high spread spikes and erratic movements.
Tutorials.configFlagsDesc: You can verify if the guard is active via the on-screen dashboard. Next to the Holiday Status, it will read Active if today is a monitored holiday. You can force-bypass this in the inputs (IgnoreHolidays = true), but taking this risk invalidates our recommended setup.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know about GoldBot and the AL-ai-FX platform.
FAQ.q1: How does the cloud compilation work?
FAQ.a1: Once you purchase a subscription and enter your MT5 account number in your Dashboard, our dedicated Windows Cloud Service dynamically modifies the source code of the EA and runs the MetaEditor compiler. This ensures the output .ex5 file is totally unique and locked securely to your account for maximum performance without lag-inducing web-requests.
FAQ.q2: Can I use the EA on multiple accounts?
FAQ.a2: Each subscription tier typically ties to one MT5 account to prevent unauthorized distribution. However, you can change your registered MT5 Account ID from the Dashboard up to 2 times a month.
FAQ.q3: What happens when my subscription expires?
FAQ.a3: The EA checks its embedded expiration date locally on instantiation. Once the date passes, the EA will stop opening new trades.
FAQ.q4: Does GoldBot handle Prop Firm rules?
FAQ.a4: Yes! With our Smart Hedging Mode and Global Liquidity Guard avoiding high-impact holidays, GoldBot is heavily optimized for Prop Firm passing and long-term funding.
